synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-0925 Important: Oracle Linux 7 libsoup security update
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-0925

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0925.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 7 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
libsoup-2.62.2-2.0.9.el7.i686.rpm
libsoup-2.62.2-2.0.9.el7.x86_64.rpm
libsoup-devel-2.62.2-2.0.9.el7.i686.rpm
libsoup-devel-2.62.2-2.0.9.el7.x86_64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol7/SRPMS-updates/libsoup-2.62.2-2.0.9.el7.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-14523




Description of changes:

[2.62.2-2.0.9]
- Fix CVE-2025-14523 [Orabug: 38873507]

[2.62.2-2.0.7]
- Backport patch for CVE-2025-4945 and CVE-2025-11021 [Orabug: 38664275]

[2.62.2-2.0.5]
- Fixes CVE-2025-2784 CVE-2025-4948 CVE-2025-32049  [Orabug: 38085184]
- CVE-2025-32906 CVE-2025-32911 CVE-2025-32913 CVE-2025-32914

[2.62.2-2.0.3]
- Fixed CVE-2024-52531 buffer overflow via UTF-8 conversion in
- soup_header_parse_param_list_strict [Orabug: 37557504]
